issue_title: Fix Go to Sleeper link in Footer.svelte
issue_body_preview: Updated footer link to "Go to Sleeper". Link was broken since svelte restricted goto function to internal only. For external urls now recommended to use: window.location = url. Change for svelte documented [here](https://github.com/sveltejs/kit/pull/8837)
test_description_zh: 在页面底部找到页脚区域，点击 'Go to Sleeper' 链接，观察页面是否正确跳转到 Sleeper 外部网站。
expected_result_zh: 点击页脚中的 'Go to Sleeper' 链接后，页面应成功跳转到 Sleeper 的外部网站（如 sleeper.com 相关页面），而不是报错、无响应或跳转到错误的内部路由。
